note: Twig Tweak is a passive Twig extension (no config UI, no permissions, no schema); it just registers ~20 Twig functions and ~18 filters. All cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing the exact function/filter names and what each renders.

evals.prompt: In a Drupal 11 Twig template, embed the 'who_s_new' view's 'block_1' display directly from the template using Twig Tweak. Show the exact Twig code.
evals.expected_output: {{ drupal_view('who_s_new', 'block_1') }} — the drupal_view() function (alias of views_embed_view) embeds a view display; extra args map to contextual filters.

evals.prompt: Using Twig Tweak, render only the `field_image` field of node 1 in the 'teaser' view mode from a Twig template. Which function and argument order?
evals.expected_output: {{ drupal_field('field_image', 'node', 1, 'teaser') }} — drupal_field(field_name, entity_type, id, view_mode) renders a single field of an entity.

evals.prompt: In a Twig template on a Drupal site, render node 123 in its 'teaser' view mode using Twig Tweak. Give the function call.
evals.expected_output: {{ drupal_entity('node', 123, 'teaser') }} — drupal_entity(entity_type, selector, view_mode) renders an entity by ID or UUID.

evals.prompt: In Twig on a Drupal 11 site, I have an image file URI 'public://images/ocean.jpg' and want the URL of its 'thumbnail' image-style derivative. Which Twig Tweak filter do I use?
evals.expected_output: {{ 'public://images/ocean.jpg'|image_style('thumbnail') }} — the image_style filter turns an image URI into an image-style derivative URL.

evals.prompt:
In a Twig template I have the string '

[site:name]

' and want Drupal to replace the tokens in it. Which Twig Tweak filter does this?
evals.expected_output:
The token_replace filter: {{ '

[site:name]

'|token_replace }} (also usable as {% apply token_replace %}…{% endapply %}).

evals.prompt: Render the 'system_branding_block' block plugin inline in a Twig template using Twig Tweak, passing a config override for its label. Show the code.
evals.expected_output: {{ drupal_block('system_branding_block', {label: 'Branding'}) }} — drupal_block(id, config, wrapper) renders a block plugin with optional config overrides.

evals.prompt: Twig Tweak's `php` filter for evaluating PHP inside a template isn't working on my Drupal site. How do I enable it, and where?
evals.expected_output: The php filter is disabled by default; enable it in settings.php with $settings['twig_tweak_enable_php_filter'] = TRUE; (discouraged).

evals.prompt: I want to register my own custom Twig function so it's available in templates via Twig Tweak. Which hook do I implement in my .module file?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_twig_tweak_functions_alter(array &$functions) and append a new \Twig\TwigFunction to the array (filters use hook_twig_tweak_filters_alter, tests use hook_twig_tweak_tests_alter).
